json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Compete six courses. Select Mathematics 31A or 31AL.

options.title: Required Mathematics
courses: MATH 31AL - Differential and Integral Calculus Laboratory

options.title: Mathematics Elective
courses: MATH 11N - Gateway to Mathematics: Number Theory
MATH 42 - Introduction to Data-Driven Mathematical Modeling: Life, Universe, and Everything

options.title: Required Courses
courses: MATH 170E - Introduction to Probability and Statistics 1: Probability
MATH 170S - Introduction to Probability and Statistics 2: Statistics
MATH 177 - Theory of Interest and Applications
MATH 178A - Foundations of Actuarial Mathematics: Life Insurance and Annuities
MATH 178B - Foundations of Actuarial Mathematics: Additional Topics in Long-Term Actuarial Mathematics
MATH 178C - Foundations of Actuarial Mathematics: Loss Models
MATH 179 - Advanced Topic in Financial Mathematics

options.title: Mathematics 174E or Economics 141 or Statistics C183
courses: MATH 174E - Mathematics of Finance for Mathematics/Economics Students
ECON 141 - Topics in Microeconomics: Mathematical Finance
STATS C183 - Statistical Models in Finance

options.title: Program in Computing Electives
courses: COMPTNG 15 - Introduction to Lisp and Symbolic Computation
COMPTNG 20A - Principles of Java Language with Applications
COMPTNG 40A - Introduction to Programming for Internet
